🌵
Level 1

DESERT DASH

Guide Sawyer across the Texas desert — baby brother Otto tags along and helps out.

Grab cool rocks (75 pts), stomp enemies (100 pts), defeat The Drifter!

❄️
Level 2

FROZEN PEAKS

Climb the icy slopes with Otto as the blizzard howls and frozen creatures stalk the snow.

Grab glowing ice crystals (75 pts), defeat frozen foes (100 pts), bring down the Yeti (+1 000)!

🦀
Level 3

SANDY SHORES

Otto spotted a hermit crab and now they're sprinting down the beach. Dodge the surf, brave the pier, and defeat King Crab Krawley!

Collect seashells (75 pts), pearl shells (150 pts), starfish (250 pts), defeat crabs & gulls (100–150 pts), beat the boss (+1 000)!

🌊
Level 4

UNDER THE SEA

Dive into a glowing deep-sea reef. Swim past darting glowfish, grasping octopi and stinging anemones, dodge the pressure-pod mines, and descend to face Leviathan Lyra!

Collect pearls (75–250 pts), strike sea creatures (100–150 pts), beat the boss (+1 000)!

👻
Level 5

SPOOKY HAUS

You've entered a haunted German manor where a rotten feast has come alive. Creaking floors, guttering candlelight, and grotesque banquet-horrors await — survive to meet Baron Von Scream!

Grab coins & spell orbs (75–250 pts), put down the feast-horrors (100–150 pts), beat the boss (+1 000)!

🌌
Final Level

OUTER SPACE

Adrift in the void between stars. Slip past the things that watch and devour in the dark — then face the tear in reality, Nexus Nine!

Collect cells (75–250 pts), banish void entities (100–150 pts), beat the final boss (+1 000)!

Sawyer & Otto: Epic Adventures

Join Sawyer and his baby brother Otto across desert dunes, icy peaks, and mysterious realms!

|
Score: 0  |  ❤️ 5 ←→ Move   ↑ Jump   ↓ Dive   Space Throw ball
You are Sawyer — run, jump, and throw to clear each world. You start with 5 hearts; lose them all and it's game over.
Otto, your baby brother, follows on his own, hops along behind you, and spits milk at any critter that gets close. He can't be hurt — only Sawyer loses hearts.
Goal: grab collectibles for points, stomp or bonk enemies, and defeat each world's boss to advance.
Power-ups: collect Baby Bottles to shield Sawyer and charge up Otto's giant form.
A game by Activities with Ryan
